answers: DJing is the art of mixing and blending recorded music for an audience. DJs use turntables, controllers, and software to create seamless transitions between songs, remix tracks, and control the energy of an event.
DJ holo je music mix kore, beat match kore, ar audience er energy control kore. Club, party, concert — shobখানe DJ thake. Equipment ar software shikhe shuru korte paro.
To start DJing, learn beatmatching, gain/volume control, and transitions. Get a beginner DJ controller (Pioneer DDJ-200 or Numark DJ2GO2) and software like Rekordbox, Serato, or Virtual DJ.

DJing can be a great career — club DJs, wedding DJs, radio DJs, and festival headliners all earn differently. Start by practicing at home, then do small gigs, build a following on social media, and network.
